name: Glowie Shooter
short_description: They glow in the dark and they are coming to get you. You’ll need to endure the relentless waves of upcoming glowies. Can you survive the night and get them before they get you?
detailed_description:
Overview


Step into the shoes of a Glowie Shooter in a first-person horror shooter where survival is your goal. You must fend off waves of eerie entities who glow in the dark. Also known as "Glowies." Use your wits, reflexes, and available weapons to survive and get as many as you can.

Gameplay


  • Face relentless waves of glowies in fast-paced, first-person shooting action. Use your given weapons to keep the glowing menace at bay.



  • As you eliminate glowies, their numbers and speed increase, making each wave more challenging than the last.

Features


  • Immerse yourself in a chilling environment with eerie soundscapes, dynamic lighting, and spine-tingling visuals.

  • Survive as long as possible against increasingly difficult waves of glowies or better yet, get the required amount of glowies to beat the game.


They are coming. How long can you last?
